docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,204.54 FILED BY GOODMAN LUMBER COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ CONNY HUECK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
